findings.description: HTML rendering contains duplicated, unstyled text content at the bottom of the page.
findings.evidence: The PDF shows a standard letter layout. The HTML shows the styled letter content followed by a redundant, plain-text block repeating the same content starting with 'ROY COOPER'.

findings.description: Reading order is confused by content bleeding from the previous page and duplicated unstyled text at the bottom.
findings.evidence: The HTML begins with a bulleted list and paragraphs from Page 1, displays the Page 2 content, and then appends a redundant, plain-text block repeating the Page 2 text.

findings.description: Reading order is confused by content bleeding from the previous page and duplicated unstyled text at the bottom.
findings.evidence: The HTML begins with text and a bulleted list from Page 2, displays the Page 3 content with signature, and then appends a redundant, plain-text block repeating the Page 3 text.
